selections.name: Ever So Ready
selections.reason: Showed ability in early starts and gets Jaden Lloyd aboard. Can handle the conditions and should be prominent.

selections.name: Vanzadee
selections.reason: Won a maiden on soft ground previously. Resumes here and has trialed well enough to feature.

selections.name: Acrodance
selections.reason: Another that broke maiden status on a soft track. Drawn well to get a good run on the pace.

selections.name: Private Max
selections.reason: Placed on a slow track on debut. Drawn well and should take improvement from that first outing.

danger_horse.name: Adora Djon's
danger_horse.reason: Has faced tougher company in open grade. Wide draw is a concern but has the class to figure.

selections.name: Weona Redwood
selections.reason: Proven heavy track performer with a win on this type of surface. Drops in class and looks very well placed despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Trump Card
selections.reason: Consistent type who handles wet ground. Drawn perfectly to get a soft run and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Whatjeudoin'
selections.reason: Veteran who has won on heavy going before. Capable of running a big race on his day.

selections.name: Kerkorian
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy tracks and will be running on strongly late. Can feature if the pace is genuine.

danger_horse.name: Steel Impact
danger_horse.reason: Consistent mare who rarely runs a bad race. Handles the wet and can sneak into the placings.

selections.name: Gratification
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy ground and brings fair form into a weak maiden. Wide draw is tricky but has the ability.

selections.name: Kalamia King
selections.reason: Another with some wet track exposure. Needs to improve but this is not a strong race.

selections.name: Ablesheeba
selections.reason: Drawn well and has shown glimpses of ability. Can figure in a race lacking depth.

selections.name: Speegle
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy going previously. Might be able to grind into a placing here.

danger_horse.name: Sorutal
danger_horse.reason: Gains a start and gets the inside draw. Could show up at odds in a chaotic race.

selections.name: Bon Vader
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with multiple placings. Handles wet tracks and looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Under Arrest
selections.reason: Placed on heavy ground and brings solid form. Will be competitive if he handles the tight track.

selections.name: She Can Soar
selections.reason: Drawn well and has shown enough to suggest she can win a maiden of this caliber.

selections.name: Hopeful Cause
selections.reason: First starter who has trialed okay. Market watch advised in a race with exposed form.

danger_horse.name: Five Of Us
danger_horse.reason: Has run some fair races and could sneak into the exotics if others fail to handle the conditions.

selections.name: Sling
selections.reason: Won on heavy ground on debut. Resumes here and looks a highly promising type who can handle the conditions.

selections.name: Saxon Spirit
selections.reason: Won well on a soft track last start. Drawn wide but has the tactical speed to overcome it.

selections.name: Alto Luna
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Saxon Spirit last time. Gets the inside draw and will be right in the finish again.

selections.name: Phere The Warrego
selections.reason: Won on debut and handles wet tracks. Can bounce back from a poor run in stronger company.

danger_horse.name: Hell Or Heaven
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who has placed on soft ground. Can figure if the pace is on.

selections.name: Winchman
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability to overcome it in this grade.

selections.name: Data Leak
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly and has a win on heavy ground. Should get a great run on the speed.

selections.name: Smart Shazza
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw and has placed on heavy tracks. Will be prominent for a long way.

selections.name: Nepravda
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy going and brings fair form. Can run into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Destinys Summit
danger_horse.reason: Has a win on heavy ground. Needs luck from the wide draw but has the ability.

selections.name: Strike Weapon
selections.reason: Drawn the rail and has placed on heavy ground. Looks well placed in a weak race.

selections.name: Spirit Of Barty
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy tracks and should be competitive if she handles the tight circuit.

selections.name: Baked
selections.reason: Has shown glimpses of ability and can figure in a race lacking depth.

selections.name: Jada Rose
selections.reason: Won on debut and could go on with it here despite the step up in class.

danger_horse.name: Southampton Nicco
danger_horse.reason: Gains a start and has placed on heavy ground. Could surprise at odds.

selections.name: Options
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Group company. Has won on heavy ground and looks extremely hard to beat here.

selections.name: Simply Gold
selections.reason: Won on heavy ground recently and drawn well. Looks the main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Chillies
selections.reason: Brings strong form from Victoria. Wide draw is a concern but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Toby's Trusty
selections.reason: Drawn well and has shown ability in better races. Can run into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Norty Forty
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who handles wet tracks. Needs luck from the extreme outside draw.
